title: eatalways
description:
It's nothing special. It allows you to eat when you're full.
It should be noted that this module is suitable for fabric version 0.17.3 above.
body:
Tip: This is the original version, so I haven't found any problems yet.
This is a module that allows players to eat and continue to eat.
It should be noted that this module is suitable for fabric version 0.17.3 above.
